examples: Late in the course of the infection, millions of new virus particles are formed and enclosed in polyhedron crystals.
Each cell in a Voronoi tessellation is a convex polyhedron.
Just know that the optimal solution for a non-integer problem is always one of the polyhedron vertices.
Collaborative exercises and informal gatherings throughout the week (polyhedron- design clinic, anyone?) add to the hive-mind ethos.
